cases.prompt: Validate this completed API change, run the smallest relevant checks, and fix any in-scope failures.
Check this dependency bump for regressions and run audit commands only if justified.
cases.notes: Risk-based validation request with explicit scope control.

cases.prompt: Implement the feature from these acceptance criteria.
Draft an issue with scope, non-goals, and acceptance criteria for a new export flow.
Audit the repo for anything risky before release and tell me what to fix.
cases.notes: The skill should not activate for broad unrelated exploratory audits.
